expectations.evidence: Report [Important]: 'Domain model now depends on database/sql and embeds SQL query logic... violating dependency direction.'

Report flags LoadOrderFromDB, ValidateOrderMinimum, FormatPrice, GetShippingZip, GetOrderSummary as zero cross-package usage. Correctly excludes CalculateOrderTotal (has cross-package ref in domain/validation.go).
Refactoring: removed transient caller-specific comments on LoadOrderFromDB and FormatPrice.
Report [Minor]: 'Law-of-Demeter violation via deep getter chaining. Evidence: order.GetCustomer().GetAddress().GetZipCode().'
Report [Important]: 'Domain package imports service package, creating an import cycle that breaks compilation.'
Uses [Important] and [Minor] with file:line, Evidence, Recommendation.
